content: Forks were used for many years in Europe and the Near East, but only for cooking.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Swift (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: TRANSLATION
ita:Le forchette furono usate per molti anni in Europa e nel Vicino Oriente, ma solamente per cucinare
